CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-22-2010 CONTINUED TO MAR-05-2010 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2010 Continued To Jun-23-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $250.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 6/23/2010 at 1:30 PM in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)
